# Car momentum concept

## Short Teaching Summary
Momentum is a quantity possessed by a car, with an example of a car possessing 20,000 units of momentum.

## Difficulty
0.10

## Prerequisites
- Linear momentum formula

## Related Concepts
- Linear momentum formula (requires)

## Misconceptions
- None recorded.

## Best Examples
- A typical automobile with a speed of 15 m/s and a mass of 1400 kg has a momentum of 21,000 kg·ms.

## Best Analogy
- None recorded.

## Source URLs
- https://openstax.org/books/university-physics-volume-1/pages/9-1-linear-momentum
- https://www.physicsclassroom.com/class/momentum/u4l1a.cfm

7
